/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/server.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/server_main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/server_base.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/server_tcp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/server_udp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/serializer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/server.dir/src/order_book.cpp.o -o /home/LeGusto/Documents/Custom-HTTP-Server/bin/server
